creatinine_clearance.title: Creatinine Clearance (Cockcroft-Gault Equation)
creatinine_clearance.description: What is the patient's Creatinine Clearance using the Cockroft-Gault Equation in terms of mL/min? You should use the patient's adjusted body weight in kg instead of the patient's actual body weight if the patient is overweight or obese based on their BMI. If the patient's BMI's normal, set their adjusted body weight to the minimum of the ideal body and actual weight. If the patient is underweight, please set their adjusted body weight to their actual body weight.

ckd_epi_gfr.title: CKD-EPI Equations for Glomerular Filtration Rate
ckd_epi_gfr.description: Using the 2021 CKD-EPI Creatinine equation, what is the patient's Glomerular Filtration Rate (GFR) in terms of mL/min/1.73 m²?

cha2ds2_vasc.title: CHA2DS2-VASc Score for Atrial Fibrillation Stroke Risk
cha2ds2_vasc.description: What is the patient's CHA2DS2-VASc Score?

mean_arterial_pressure.title: Mean Arterial Pressure (MAP)
mean_arterial_pressure.description: What is patient's mean arterial pressure in mm Hg?

bmi.title: Body Mass Index (BMI)
bmi.description: What is the patient's body mass mass index (BMI)? Your answer should be in terms of kg/m².

calcium_correction.title: Calcium Correction for Hypoalbuminemia
calcium_correction.description: Using the Calcium Correction for Hypoalbuminemia formula, what is the patient's corrected calcium in mg/dL? Your may set your normal albumin concentration to be 4 g/dL.

wells_pe.title: Wells' Criteria for Pulmonary Embolism
wells_pe.description: What is the patient's score of Wells' criteria for Pulmonary Embolism?

inputs.label: Malignancy with treatment within 6 months or palliative
Pulmonary Embolism is #1 diagnosis OR equally likely
Clinical signs and symptoms of Deep Vein Thrombosis

mdrd_gfr.title: MDRD GFR Equation
mdrd_gfr.description: Using the MDRD GFR Equation, what is the patient's Glomerular Filtration Rate (GFR) in terms of mL/min/1.73 m²? If the patient is black, please use the MDRD GFR Equation for blacks.

ideal_body_weight.title: Ideal Body Weight
ideal_body_weight.description: Using the Devine formula, what is the patient's ideal body weight?

qtc_bazett.title: QTc Bazett Calculator
qtc_bazett.description: Using the Bazett Formula for corrected QT interval, what is the patient's corrected QT interval in terms of msec?

estimated_due_date.title: Estimated Due Date
estimated_due_date.description: Using Naegele's Rule for estimated due date based on the last menstrual period and cycle length, what is the the patient's estimated due date? Your response should be in the format of M/D/Y (ie 08/31/2023, 07/03/2000) with just the date and no other text.

child_pugh.title: Child-Pugh Score for Cirrhosis Mortality
child_pugh.description: What is the patient's Child-Pugh Score?

wells_dvt.title: Wells' Criteria for DVT
wells_dvt.description: What is the patient's score of Wells' criteria for Deep Vein Thrombosis?

inputs.label: Alternative diagnosis to Deep Vein Thrombosis as likely or more likely
Localized tenderness along the deep venous system
Paralysis, paresis, or recent plaster immobilization of the lower extremity
Calf swelling >3 centimeters compared to the other leg
Pitting edema, confined to symptomatic leg

rcri.title: Revised Cardiac Risk Index for Pre-Operative Risk
rcri.description: What is the patient's score of the Revised Cardiac Risk Index for Pre-Operative Risk?

inputs.label: Congestive Heart Failure criteria for the Cardiac Risk Index rule

heart_score.title: HEART Score for Major Cardiac Events
heart_score.description: What is the patient's score of the HEART Score?

inputs.label: parent or sibling with Cardiovascular disease before age 65

fib4.title: Fibrosis-4 (FIB-4) Index for Liver Fibrosis
fib4.description: What is the patient's score of the Fibrosis 4 Index?

centor_score.title: Centor Score (Modified/McIsaac) for Strep Pharyngitis
centor_score.description: What is the patient's Centor Score?

glasgow_coma_score.title: Glasgow Coma Score (GCS)
glasgow_coma_score.description: What is the patient's Glasgow Coma Score?

maintenance_fluids.title: Maintenance Fluids Calculations
maintenance_fluids.description: Based on the patient's weight, what is the patient's maintenance fluid in mL/hr?

meld_na.title: MELD Na (UNOS/OPTN)
meld_na.description: What is the patient's MELD Na (UNOS/OPTN) score?

inputs.label: Continuous veno-venous hemodialysis for ≥24 hours in the past week
Dialysis at least twice in the past week

has_bled.title: HAS-BLED Score for Major Bleeding Risk
has_bled.description: What is the patient's HAS-BLED score?

inputs.label: Liver disease criteria for the HAS-BLED rule
Renal disease criteria for the HAS-BLED rule
Number of Alcoholic Drinks Per Week
Prior major bleeding or predisposition to bleeding

sodium_correction_hyperglycemia.title: Sodium Correction for Hyperglycemia
sodium_correction_hyperglycemia.description: What is the patient's corrected sodium concentration for hyperglycemia in terms of mEq/L? Use the sodium correction equation based on the one derived in Hillier, 1999.

glasgow_blatchford.title: Glasgow-Blatchford Bleeding Score (GBS)
glasgow_blatchford.description: What is the patient's Glasgow-Blatchford Bleeding score?

apache2.title: APACHE II Score
apache2.description: What is the patient's APACHE II score?

inputs.label: History of severe organ failure or immunocompromise

psi_cap.title: PSI Score: Pneumonia Severity Index for CAP
psi_cap.description: What is the patient's Pneumonia Severity Index (PSI)?

serum_osmolality.title: Serum Osmolality
serum_osmolality.description: What is the patient's serum osmolality in terms of mOsm/kg? You may take the alcohol content as 0 mg/dL.

homa_ir.title: HOMA-IR (Homeostatic Model Assessment for Insulin Resistance)
homa_ir.description: What is the patient's HOMA-IR score?

cci.title: Charlson Comorbidity Index (CCI)
cci.description: What is the patient's Charlson Comorbidity Index (CCI)?

inputs.label: Moderate to severe Chronic Kidney Disease

feverpain.title: FeverPAIN Score for Strep Pharyngitis
feverpain.description: What is the patient's FeverPAIN score?

caprini_vte.title: Caprini Score for Venous Thromboembolism (2005)
caprini_vte.description: What is the patient's Caprini Score for Venous Thromboembolism?

inputs.label: Major Surgery in the last month
Congestive Heart Failure in the last month
Immobilizing plaster cast in the last month
Hip, pelvis, or leg fracture in the last month
Multiple trauma in the last month
Acute spinal cord injury causing paralysis in the last month

free_water_deficit.title: Free Water Deficit
free_water_deficit.description: What is the patient's free water deficit in terms of kg? The desired serum sodium concentration is 140 mEq/L.

anion_gap.title: Anion Gap
anion_gap.description: What is the patient's anion gap in terms of mEq/L?

fena.title: Fractional Excretion of Sodium (FENa)
fena.description: What is the patient's Fractional Excretion of Sodium (FENa)? Please return your answer as a percentage value.

sofa.title: Sequential Organ Failure Assessment (SOFA) Score
sofa.description: What is the patient's Sequential Organ Failure Assessment (SOFA) Score?

ldl_calculated.title: LDL Calculated
ldl_calculated.description: What is the patient's LDL cholestrol concentration? Please outuput your answer in terms of mg/dL.

curb65.title: CURB-65 Score for Pneumonia Severity
curb65.description: What is the patient's CURB-65 score?

framingham_chd.title: Framingham Risk Score for Hard Coronary Heart Disease
framingham_chd.description: Based on the Framingham Risk Score for Hard Coronary Heart Disease, what is the likelihood of 10-year risk of MI or death for this patient? Please return your answer as a percentage value.

inputs.label: Blood pressure being treated with medicines

perc_rule.title: PERC Rule for Pulmonary Embolism
perc_rule.description: What are the number of criteria met for the PERC Rule for Pulmonary Embolism (PE)?

mme.title: Morphine Milligram Equivalents (MME) Calculator
mme.description: Calculates the patient's daily Morphine Milligram Equivalents (MME) from their opioid prescriptions using the CDC 2022 conversion factors.

item_schema.drug: One of: Codeine, FentaNYL buccal, FentaNYL patch, HYDROcodone, HYDROmorphone, Methadone, Morphine, OxyCODONE, OxyMORphone, Tapentadol, TraMADol, Buprenorphine
item_schema.dose_unit: mg for most opioids; mcg for fentaNYL
item_schema.doses_per_day: Number of doses taken per day

sirs.title: SIRS Criteria
sirs.description: What are the number of SIRS critiera met by the patient?

qtc_fridericia.title: QTc Fridericia Calculator
qtc_fridericia.description: Using the Fridericia Formula for corrected QT interval, what is the patient's corrected QT interval in terms of msec?

qtc_framingham.title: QTc Framingham Calculator
qtc_framingham.description: Using the Framingham Formula for corrected QT interval, what is the patient's corrected QT interval in terms of msec?

qtc_hodges.title: QTc Hodges Calculator
qtc_hodges.description: Using the Hodges Formula for corrected QT interval, what is the patient's corrected QT interval in terms of msec?

qtc_rautaharju.title: QTc Rautaharju Calculator
qtc_rautaharju.description: Using the Rautaharju Formula for corrected QT interval, what is the patient's corrected QT interval in terms of msec?

bsa.title: Body Surface Area Calculator
bsa.description: What is the patient's body surface area? Please output your answer in terms of m².

target_weight.title: Target weight
target_weight.description: Based on the patient's height and target BMI, what is the patient's target weight in kg?

adjusted_body_weight.title: Adjusted Body Weight
adjusted_body_weight.description: Using the adjusted body weight formula, what is the patient's adjusted body weight in terms of kg?

delta_gap.title: Delta Gap
delta_gap.description: What is the patient's delta gap in mEq/L?

delta_ratio.title: Delta Ratio
delta_ratio.description: What is the patient's delta ratio?

albumin_corrected_anion_gap.title: Albumin Corrected Anion Gap
albumin_corrected_anion_gap.description: What is the patient's albumin corrected anion gap in mEq/L?

albumin_corrected_delta_gap.title: Albumin Corrected Delta Gap
albumin_corrected_delta_gap.description: What is the patient's albumin corrected delta gap in mEq/L?

albumin_corrected_delta_ratio.title: Albumin Corrected Delta Ratio
albumin_corrected_delta_ratio.description: What is the patient's albumin corrected delta ratio?

estimated_conception_date.title: Estimated Date of Conception
estimated_conception_date.description: Based on the patient's last menstrual period, what is the the patient's estimated date of conception? Your answer should be in the format of M/D/Y (ie 08/31/2023, 07/03/2000) with just the date and not other text.

estimated_gestational_age.title: Estimated Gestational Age
estimated_gestational_age.description: Based on the patient's last menstrual period, what is the patient's estimated gestational age? Your answer should be a tuple, specifying the number of weeks and days (i.e. (4 weeks, 3 days), (0 weeks, 5 days), (1 week, 5 days), (8 weeks, 0 days)).
